Only issue is sometimes the score reel does not completely set over and you have to hit the button again to restart it. One of those Ghost in the machine kind of things that she just couldn't figure out . I have owned this game since 1979 when I received it as a kid. You might have seen this up for sale in the past and then the listing disappeared. This was a period of time when I needed money for something so I put it up for sale but then something else came through and I took it down because I didn't really want to sell it. At this point in life it is mostly just nostalgia. I just don't play it anymore. It is very fun game I am just bored with it after 45 years and want something different. Very open to trades for a newer pinball machine plus cash on my end. Thanks for looking! Nine zero four four four four one four three nine.. Dave

Reddit Reddit Cause: A failure in the monitor's vertical deflection circuit, often caused by dried-out or bad electrolytic capacitors. Fix: A "cap kit" (capacitor replacement) for the monitor chassis is typically required. Can deliver for additional fee.

It’s been well-maintained and is ready to provide endless entertainment right out of the box. This cabinet is a show-stopper for any: • Game room • Man cave • Basement bar • Retro collector’s lineup These original dedicated 1982 uprights are getting rarer every year, especially in solid working shape like this one. Price: $1,900 or best offer Local pickup only (cash preferred). It’s a big, heavy classic (roughly 72" tall), so bring a friend or a truck — happy to help load it! Serious buyers only — message me anytime with questions or to set up a time to come test it out and play a few rounds. First come, first served. #DigDug #VintageArcade #Atari1982 #RetroGaming #ArcadeCabinet #ClassicArcade
